name: BetterTouchTool
description: macOS input customization app — trackpad gestures, Touch Bar, keyboard shortcuts, window management, and automation.

seo.title: BetterTouchTool — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: BetterTouchTool: macOS input customization app — trackpad gestures, Touch Bar, keyboard shortcuts, window management, and automation.

when_to_use: Custom trackpad gestures to switch between coding workspaces
Automating macOS window snapping with keyboard shortcuts
Touch Bar shortcuts for frequently used dev commands
Hyper-key setup for global application hotkeys
Batch automation scripts triggered by input events

pros: Touch Bar, keyboard, and window control
cons: Steep curve to unlock full power
review.verdict: The most powerful macOS input customizer — once configured, you cant go back to stock.
review.best_for: Mac power users squeezing productivity from gestures, shortcuts, and window management
review.not_for: Casual users who wont invest time learning its dense configuration
